title: UPSC CSE 2025 Result (OUT): Check Names Of Qualified Candidates, Direct Link Here
description: UPSC 2025 Topper List: Kota's Anuj Agnihotri, a doctor by profession, has secured All India Rank (AIR) 1 in the prestigious examination. Rajeshwari Suve M and Akanksha Dhull have secured the second and third ranks, respectively.
